app.title: Love Talk — Conversation Cards
app.subtitle: Start with one card and move a little closer.

home.title: Choose the theme for tonight
home.description: Pick one of four relationship themes that fits your mood.
home.intimateModeHint: Add 5 prompts that go deeper into closeness and desire.
home.startHint: Tap any theme card to begin.

attraction.name: Attraction & Sparks
attraction.description: Return to the earliest moments of excitement.

self.name: Self & Exploration
self.description: Know yourself better and let your partner see you.

interaction.name: Interaction & Understanding
interaction.description: Make your communication patterns easier to understand.

trust.name: Trust & Growth
trust.description: Talk about trust, the future, and growing together.

orientation.title: Please rotate your phone back to portrait
orientation.description: For the best experience, play in portrait orientation.

end.title: This round is complete
end.cta: Go back home and pick another theme to continue.

modal.leaveTitle: Are you sure you want to leave?
modal.leaveDescription: If you leave now, the progress of this round will be cleared.
